title: TargetPopup Class
description: Represents a container that can be displayed anywhere or attached to another element.

constructors.name: constructor(element?: HTMLElement)
constructors.description: Initializes a new instance of the TargetPopup class from element.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create TargetPopup control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly elementAttached?: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the element attached to the TargetPopup.
properties.remarks: If the TargetPopup is attached to an element, the <mark>POPUP-ATTACHED</mark> class is added to that element.

properties.name: readonly visible: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the popup is displayed.

properties.name: locations: number[]
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement locations for the popup.

properties.name: option: ShowAtOption
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement option for the popup.

overloads.name: showAt(target: HTMLElement): void
overloads.description: Shows the popup so that it stays near another element.

overloads.name: showAt(target: PointLike): void
overloads.description: Shows the popup at the coordinates relative to the document.

events.name: targetpopuphide
events.description: The hiding event fires when the popup is hidden.

static_methods.name: showAt(element: HTMLElement, target: HTMLElement, locations?: number[], option?: math.ShowAtOption): TargetPopup
static_methods.description: Shows the specified element as the TargetPopup.

overloads.name: showAt(element: HTMLElement, target: HTMLElement, locations?: number[], option?: math.ShowAtOption): TargetPopup
overloads.description: Shows the popup so that it stays near another element.

overloads.name: showAt(element: HTMLElement, target: PointLike, locations?: number[], option?: math.ShowAtOption): TargetPopup
overloads.description: Shows the popup at the coordinates relative to the document.

static_methods.remarks: The <mark>showAt</mark> instantiates a new TargetPopup or reuses; sets its location and options, and then calls <mark>TargetPopup.showAt</mark>.
